title: Subcontractor Margin Leak Detector
description: Industrial-grade tool to detect and quantify margin erosion in subcontractor operations, based on ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Actual Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost incurred by subcontractor.

inputs.label: Actual Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total material cost incurred by subcontractor.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

inputs.label: Quality Rework Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

inputs.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
inputs.businessContext: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-time).

inputs.label: Waste Factor (Lean Muda)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated waste as percentage of total direct costs (Lean manufacturing).

inputs.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of standard labor hours to actual labor hours (WERC DC metrics).

inputs.label: Material Price Variance
inputs.businessContext: Difference between standard and actual material prices.

inputs.label: Scope Change Cost
inputs.businessContext: Additional costs from unapproved scope changes.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

inputs.label: Currency Exchange Loss
inputs.businessContext: Loss due to unfavorable exchange rate fluctuations.

inputs.label: Contract Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

inputs.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
inputs.businessContext: Apply Lean accounting principles to value stream costing.

rules.condition: contract_type == 'Fixed Price' && actual_labor_cost + actual_material_cost + actual_equipment_cost > contract_value * 0.9
rules.message: Direct costs exceed 90% of contract value for fixed-price contract. High risk of margin leak.
Labor efficiency index below 0.7 indicates significant productivity loss.
Waste factor exceeds 15% threshold. Investigate Lean muda sources.

formulas.label: Total Direct Cost
formulas.description: Sum of all direct costs incurred by subcontractor.

formulas.label: Overhead Cost
formulas.description: Allocated overhead based on direct costs.

formulas.label: Lean Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of waste (Lean Muda) as a percentage of direct costs.

formulas.label: Labor Inefficiency Cost
formulas.description: Cost due to labor inefficiency (standard vs actual).

formulas.label: Total Hidden Loss
formulas.expression: quality_rework_cost + schedule_delay_penalty + material_price_variance + scope_change_cost + inventory_holding_cost + currency_exchange_loss + lean_waste_cost + labor_inefficiency_cost
formulas.description: Aggregate of all hidden losses not captured in standard cost accounting.

formulas.label: Total Actual Cost
formulas.description: Comprehensive actual cost including overhead and hidden losses.

formulas.label: Margin Leak Percentage (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Percentage of margin eroded due to cost overruns and hidden losses. Primary KPI.

primary.label: Margin Leak Percentage
primary.description: Primary result indicating the percentage of contract margin lost to inefficiencies and hidden costs.

margin_leak_amount.label: Margin Leak Amount
margin_leak_amount.description: Absolute dollar amount of margin leak (contract_value - total_actual_cost).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Rework Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Non-conformance rework indicates process instability (Six Sigma).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Late delivery penalties disrupt cash flow and customer trust.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waste Factor
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High waste indicates Lean Muda in production.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Labor Inefficiency Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Low labor efficiency index points to training or process issues.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Material Price Variance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Market fluctuations or poor procurement practices.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct Lean Kaizen Event
suggestedActions.description: Target waste reduction and process flow improvement (Lean).

suggestedActions.label: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC Project
suggestedActions.description: Reduce quality rework and process variation.

suggestedActions.label: Labor Efficiency Training Program
suggestedActions.description: Improve labor efficiency index through standardized work.

suggestedActions.label: Strengthen Scope Change Control
suggestedActions.description: Implement formal change order process to prevent margin leak.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Inventory Levels
suggestedActions.description: Apply WERC best practices for inventory turnover.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Currency Hedging Strategy
suggestedActions.description: Mitigate exchange rate risk on international contracts.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusted confidence level based on input completeness and accuracy. Default 85% if all inputs provided, reduced if missing or estimated.
